description: SELECT from a VIEW should resolve column types from the underlying table
name: select_from_view
query_sql:
-- @name ListActiveUsers
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, name, email FROM active_users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active');
CREATE VIEW active_users AS SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE status = 'active';
